evals.prompt: Run /topics with no arguments to show my full topic registry. The harness is at $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/harness.config.json and the research index is at $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/reports/example-okf-mif-knowledge-spine/research-index.json. When done, write the rendered table and summary line to topics.md in the working directory.
evals.expected_output: A Markdown table written to topics.md showing the one registered topic (Example: OKF+MIF as a foundational research knowledge spine, harness/example-okf-mif-knowledge-spine, archived, 36 findings, survived: 31) with the correct table header and a summary line '1 topics, 1 with findings.'

deterministic_checks.description: Output file was created
Table header matches the exact format specified in SKILL.md
The MIF namespace appears in the table
The topic status (archived) appears in the table
Verdict rollup shows 31 survived findings — proves the namespace join worked (the field that was previously null)
Summary line reports 1 topic with 1 having findings
No error message appears when listing all topics

expectations: The finding count shown in the Findings column is 36, matching the 36 entries in research-index.json for the harness/example-okf-mif-knowledge-spine namespace.
The table row for the example topic has all five cells populated — no empty cells in any column.
The summary line appears after the table, not before it.

evals.prompt: Run /topics -t example to resolve the topic matching 'example'. The harness is at $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/harness.config.json and the research index is at $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/reports/example-okf-mif-knowledge-spine/research-index.json. Write the rendered output to topics.md.
evals.expected_output: The output in topics.md shows the matched topic (Example: OKF+MIF as a foundational research knowledge spine) with its namespace, status, and finding rollup including survived: 31. No 'not found' message appears.

deterministic_checks.description: Output file was created
The MIF namespace of the matched topic appears
Verdict rollup confirms the namespace join ran and 31 findings survived
No 'not found' error appears when the query matches a topic

expectations: The query 'example' matches the registered topic by title substring ('Example: OKF+MIF ...') and that topic's row is shown.
The output is scoped to the single matched topic — it does not render the entire registry with a filter applied on top.
The topic's status (archived) is visible somewhere in the output row.

evals.prompt: Run /topics -t zzznotopic to look up a topic that does not exist. The harness is at $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/harness.config.json and the research index is at $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/reports/example-okf-mif-knowledge-spine/research-index.json. Write the full output — including any not-found message and the fallback table — to topics.md.
evals.expected_output: The output in topics.md contains the exact message 'Topic "zzznotopic" not found' and then displays the full topic table as a fallback, per SKILL.md spec.

deterministic_checks.description: Output file was created
Exact not-found message per SKILL.md: Topic "<query>" not found
The full topic table is shown as fallback after the not-found message

expectations: The not-found message appears before the fallback table, not after it.
The fallback table is the complete registry (all topics with rollup data), not an empty table.
The skill does not fabricate or fuzzy-match a topic named 'zzznotopic' — only the exact-literal not-found message and the real registry appear.

evals.prompt: Run /topics --status active to filter the registry to active topics only. The harness is at $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/harness.config.json and the research index is at $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/reports/example-okf-mif-knowledge-spine/research-index.json. Write the rendered filtered table to topics.md.
evals.expected_output: The output in topics.md shows no topic rows — the only registered topic is archived, not active. The example topic title and 'harness/example-okf-mif-knowledge-spine' must not appear.

deterministic_checks.description: Output file was created
The archived topic's namespace must not appear when filtering by active status

expectations: The '--status active' filter returns no rows — the sole registered topic has status=archived in harness.config.json.
The skill does not fall back to showing all topics when the status filter matches nothing — it shows an empty or zero-row result.
The table header row may still appear but contains no data rows beneath it.

evals.prompt: Run /topics --status archived to filter the registry to archived topics only. The harness is at $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/harness.config.json and the research index is at $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/reports/example-okf-mif-knowledge-spine/research-index.json. Write the rendered filtered table to topics.md.
evals.expected_output: The output in topics.md shows the one archived topic (Example: OKF+MIF as a foundational research knowledge spine, harness/example-okf-mif-knowledge-spine, archived, survived: 31). No non-archived topics appear.

deterministic_checks.description: Output file was created
The archived topic appears in the filtered output
The status column confirms the topic is archived
Verdict rollup for the archived topic shows 31 survived findings

expectations: The '--status archived' filter returns exactly the one topic that has status=archived in harness.config.json.
No topic with a different status (e.g. active, draft) appears in the output.
The finding rollup for the archived topic shows the correct count (36) from the research index.
